abstract: This paper develops an offline reinforcement learning framework that identifies and evaluate the ad sequencing policy that optimizes user engagement.

affiliation: Cornell Tech, New York, New York 10044;
SC Johnson College of Business, Cornell University, Ithaca, New York 14853
authors_full.name: Omid Rafieian

ob.ai_reason: 离线强化学习优化广告排序，AI为核心方法
ob.tldr: 研究离线强化学习框架在广告排序中的应用，以优化用户参与度。实验基于大规模日志数据，评估多种排序策略，发现基于模型的策略显著提升点击率和停留时长，且在长期用户价值上优于贪心方法。

title: Optimizing User Engagement Through Adaptive Ad Sequencing
title_zh: 通过自适应广告排序优化用户参与度
